misc: Appreciates the thoughtful course designs of Kosti Kuronen who passed away in 2024
biography: Ofri, a golfer hailing from Golf Pirkkala, is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée. Known for his calm demeanor and meticulous approach to the game, Ofri appreciates the strategic elements of golf and is always looking to improve his game. He currently resides in Tampere, Finland.

This year marks Ofri's fourth appearance at the prestigious tournament. Although he has yet to capture the coveted Hector Trophée or the Victor Trophy, his consistent performance and dedication suggest that he is always a contender.
Off the course, Ofri is known to appreciate the thoughtful course designs of the late Kosti Kuronen, finding inspiration in Kuronen's work and the creativity that Kosti brought to the sport.
